# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues, pull requests, or discussions.**

Instead, use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/jongpie/NebulaLogger/security/advisories/new) for this repository. This ensures the report is visible only to the maintainer until a fix is released.

When reporting, please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce, including any relevant Apex, LWC, or configuration details.
- The Nebula Logger package edition (Unlocked or Managed) and version where the issue was observed.
- The Salesforce API version, if relevant.
- Any mitigations or workarounds you have identified.

## What to Expect

- Acknowledgement of your report within a reasonable timeframe.
- An initial assessment and, where possible, a proposed fix timeline.
- Credit in the release notes once the fix is published, unless you request otherwise.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version of each package (Unlocked and Managed) is actively supported with security fixes. Please upgrade to the latest version before reporting.
